text:
Created attachment 226406
build output for misc/shared-mime-info

ON a stable 12 system and a Python 3.7 default version
I am unable to complete a build of misc/shared-mime-info.
I haven't really investigated the error. But have attached
the complete output of the build in hopes it helps.

Thank you for all your time, and consideration.

--Chris
